name: For King & Country
title: Christian Pop Duo
bio: Australian Christian pop duo consisting of brothers Joel and Luke Smallbone. Multiple Grammy Award winners known for 'God Only Knows,' 'joy.,' and 'Burn the Ships.'
faith: The Smallbone brothers grew up in a Christian family that moved from Australia to America with nothing. They have shared their family's testimony of God's provision and faithfulness extensively in interviews and their music.

sources.title: For King & Country — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Christian pop duo

sources.title: For King & Country — Family Testimony
sources.note: The Smallbone brothers sharing their family's story of faith

tagline: Brothers making anthems of hope that point to the King
